titleStmt.title: SII 8.411: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 411. (A.R. No. 125 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śrīmat kittikkumel cikoccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakra- vattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīcuntarapā
ṇṭiyatevaṟku Āṇṭu 10 4vatu mīṉnāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu saptami yum nāyittukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattunā
ḷ curavināṭṭuc cūḻumaracarkaṇṭaṉ Ūrāy Amainta Ūrom keraḷāntakavaḷanāṭṭu brahmade yam maṭṭiyūrāṉa nṛpa
śekharacaturvveti maṅkalattu sa vaṉṉauṭaiyār caṅkattaḻakarāṉa vaidyādhirājat kku pramā ṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttapari
cāvatu . Eṅkaḷūr paṟṟil kuṭikkāṭṭu ciṟukkollaṉkuḷattil virappulināṭā
ḻvāṟkku Uḷkiṭaiyāṉa cellāṇṭivayakkalum Itaṉ kāliṭaikku konṟaivayakkalum Ākat taṭi Iraṇṭu
kku Ivar vilaikoṇṭuuṭaiyarāy Aṉupavittuppotukiṟa nilaṅkaḷ muṟṟum Eṅkaḷūril piḷḷai pallavarāyar tirunāmattā
l Eṟiaruḷap paṇṇukiṟa Aḻakapperumāḷviṇṇakar Emperumāṉukku kaṭamai Antarāyamum Ivaidyādhirājat kku kārā
ṇmaiyumāka kuṭukkaiyil Icciṟukkollaṉkuḷattil virappulināṭāḻvā nilattu Ivar vilaikoṇṭa nilattukku nāṭi
ntamariyāti Uḷḷa Accum taimātamutal kaḻittu Ināyaṉāṟkuk kaṭamai nicata maṭaittuk kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu . patiṉeṭṭaṭikkolāl Iru
nūṟṟu Aimpattāṟu kuḻi koṇṭa nilam Orumāvukku karumpu yerum pū payiṟpāṟtup payirniṉṟa nilattukku kaṭamai Antarāyam viṉiyo
gam cilvari peruvari poṉvari taṟiiṟai taṭṭolipāṭṭam pañcupili san=tivigra- happeṟu veṭṭi muṭṭāḷ maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa vari
kaḷum nāṭṭukkālāl Aṟukala nellum Orupaṇamum Iṟuppārākavum koṭaikāla ttu kuṟuvai varaku tiṉai payirniṉṟa nilattukku māt
tāl Ippeciṉa kaṭamaiyil nālil Oṉṟu Iṟuppārākavum vaḻutilai pūcaṇi veḷḷari ceṅkaḻunir mañcaḷ Iñci karuṇai Eḷ
ḷu Uḷḷiṭṭa payirukku māttāl Oru paṇam Iṟuppatākavum Ippaṭi Innāyaṉāṟku kaṭamai Antarāyamum Ivaidyādhirā
jat kku kārāṇmaiyumāka Eṅkaḷūrp puravilum kaḻittu variyilum piṟittuk kuṭuttamaikku nāṉkellaikaḷilum
tiruvāḻikkallum nāṭṭi candrādityavat celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭuvittukkoḷvarāka pramā ṇam paṇṇikkuṭu
ttom cūḻumaracarkaṇṭaṉ Ūrāy Amainta Ūrom Uṭaiyār caṅkattaḻakarāṉa vaidyādhirājat kku . Ippaṭikku maṅkalātevap
pallavataraiyar taṟkuṟikku taṟkuṟi māṭṭeṟintu Ippaṭikku vañcimaṇṭalattu nāṭāḻvār taṟkuṟikkum cuntarapāṇ
ṭiya nāṭāḻvār taṟkuṟikku teṉ nāṭṭukkaṇakku Eḻuttu .
At the commencement of the line is a cross mark, which evidently denotes the mark of the tarkuri mentioned in the line.Ippaṭikkuc coḻapperayaṉ taṟkkuṟiyum māṭṭeṟintamaiykku nāṉu maṟiveṉ nāṭṭukkaṇakku nārāyaṇappiḷḷai Eḻuttu .
At the beginning of this line are two cross-marks denoting the marks of the two taṟkuṟis occurring in the line.Ippaṭikku cerapāṇṭiyapperayar taṟkuṟikkum ceḻiyataraiyar taṟkkuṟikkum taṟkkuṟi māṭṭeṟinteṉ valaṅkai nārāyaṇate
vaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ colla Inta pramā ṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ ca[ ṉtra] mauḷi paṭṭaṉ Ūṟkkaṇakku Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 8.411 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
